name: bistromath-thinking-tools
description: BistroMath Thinking Tools — adversarial plan grilling (grill-me and grill-with-docs, written by Matt Pocock and repackaged here with full credit — a great idea worth bundling), guided ideation (ideation-partner), Munger-style inversion for business decisions (never-lose) and code (munger), and Doolittle, the deal-side copilot for real estate agents.
